app.name: TaxoAI
app.description: AI-powered product categorization and SEO optimization

welcome.heading: Welcome to TaxoAI
welcome.description: Get started by configuring your TaxoAI API key in Settings. TaxoAI will automatically categorize your products and generate SEO-optimized content.

recentAnalyses.title: Recent Analyses
recentAnalyses.empty: No products have been analyzed yet. Use Bulk Analyze to get started.

api.title: API Configuration
api.description: Enter your TaxoAI API key to enable product analysis. You can obtain a key from the TaxoAI dashboard.
api.apiKeyHelp: Your TaxoAI API key. The key will be validated when you save.
api.languageHelp: Language for product analysis and SEO content generation.

behavior.title: Analysis Behavior
behavior.description: Configure when and how products are analyzed.
behavior.autoAnalyzeHelp: Automatically analyze products when they are created or updated.
behavior.confidenceThresholdHelp: Only apply changes automatically when confidence is at or above this threshold.
behavior.analyzeImagesHelp: Use AI to analyze product images for colors, materials, and style. This may use additional API credits.

content.title: Content Updates
content.description: Choose what product fields TaxoAI should update with optimized content.
content.updateTitleHelp: Replace the product title with the SEO-optimized version from TaxoAI.
content.updateDescriptionHelp: Replace the product description with the SEO-optimized version from TaxoAI.
content.alwaysUpdated: SEO meta title and meta description are always updated. Tags are added without overwriting existing ones. Google category and product attributes are always written as metafields.

product.notFoundMessage: The product with ID {{id}} could not be found in your store.
product.notAnalyzed: This product has not been analyzed yet.
product.analysisComplete: Product has been analyzed and updated successfully.
product.apiKeyRequiredMessage: Configure your TaxoAI API key in Settings to analyze products.

manualOverride.title: Manual Category Override
manualOverride.description: Search for a Google Product Taxonomy category to manually assign to this product.

bulk.title: Bulk Analyze
bulk.processing: Processing... This may take a few minutes for large batches.
bulk.completeMessage: All {{count}} products have been analyzed and updated.
bulk.failedMessage: The batch job encountered an error. Please try again.

usage.limitReachedMessage: You have used {{used}} of {{limit}} products this month. Upgrade your plan to continue analyzing products.
usage.approachingMessage: You have used {{used}} of {{limit}} products this month ({{percentage}}%).
